value.0: Suits of armor like this one are forged within the fires of Ordurin and given to the elite solders of Sauron.
Suits of armor like this one are forged within the fires of Ordurin and given to the elite solders of Sauron.

The garb of the fool, Santilen. For many years he performed at court for a high wizardess. The wizardess came to love her entertainer, and bestowed upon him these robes, hoping they would keep him from harm if any trouble were to happen his way. The next day, the wizardess' castle was invaded. The whole court was slaughtered, and these mysterious robes were lost for many years.

This ring is an unadorned silver band.  However, its plain appearance belies the powerful magic within. A Ring of Anti-Venom is eagerly sought after by royalty, influential political figures and other potential assassination targets.

This smooth gem is cool to the touch and is only procured through the sneakiest means possible.  

There may be many hidden uses for this gem, if you will find them you will be delighted beyond compare!
